remediation: CloudFront Minimum Protocol version should be at least TLS 1.2
title: CloudFront Without Minimum Protocol TLS 1.2

remediation: Glue Data Catalog Encryption Settings should have 'connection_password_encryption' and 'encryption_at_rest' enabled
title: Glue Data Catalog Encryption Disabled

remediation: Amazon DMS is publicly accessible, therefore exposing possible sensitive information. To prevent such a scenario, update the attribute 'PubliclyAccessible' to false.
title: Amazon DMS Replication Instance Is Publicly Accessible

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'lambda:CreateFunction' and 'iam:PassRole' and 'lambda:InvokeFunction' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'lambda:CreateFunction' And 'iam:PassRole' And 'lambda:InvokeFunction'

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:CreateLoginProfile' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:CreateLoginProfile'

remediation: Checks if CloudWatch Metrics is Enabled
title: CloudWatch Metrics Disabled

remediation: AWS Shield Advanced should be used for Amazon Route 53 hosted zone, AWS Global Accelerator accelerator, Elastic IP Address, Elastic Load Balancing, and Amazon CloudFront Distribution to protect these resources against robust DDoS attacks
title: Shield Advanced Not In Use

remediation: AWS DB Instance should have its storage encrypted by setting the parameter to 'true'. The storage_encrypted default value is 'false'.
title: DB Instance Storage Not Encrypted

remediation: Cross-Account IAM Assume Role Policy should require external ID or MFA to protect cross-account access
title: Cross-Account IAM Assume Role Policy Without ExternalId or MFA

remediation: Redshift Cluster should be configured in VPC (Virtual Private Cloud)
title: Redshift Cluster Without VPC

remediation: Role with privilege escalation by actions 'glue:CreateDevEndpoint' and 'iam:PassRole' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Role With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'glue:CreateDevEndpoint' And 'iam:PassRole'

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for changes to NACL
title: CloudWatch Changes To NACL Alarm Missing

remediation: API Gateway REST API should have an API Gateway Authorizer
title: API Gateway Without Configured Authorizer

remediation: All Application Load Balancers (ALB) must be protected with Web Application Firewall (WAF) service
title: ALB Is Not Integrated With WAF

remediation: AWS CloudWatch Log groups should be encrypted using KMS
title: CloudWatch Log Group Without KMS

remediation: SSL Client Certificate should be enabled
title: API Gateway Without SSL Certificate

remediation: AWS KMS Key should have a valid deletion window
title: KMS Key With No Deletion Window

remediation: EC2 instances should use roles to be granted access to other AWS services
title: EC2 Instance Using API Keys

remediation: Dynamodb VPC Endpoint should be associated with Route Table Association
title: Dynamodb VPC Endpoint Without Route Table Association

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:PutUserPolicy' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:PutUserPolicy'

remediation: Lambda permission may be misconfigured if the action field is not filled in by 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
title: Lambda IAM InvokeFunction Misconfigured

remediation: ECR repositories should be encrypted with customer-managed keys to meet stricter security and compliance requirements on access control, monitoring, and key rotation
title: ECR Repository Not Encrypted With CMK

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for CloudTrail configuration changes
title: Cloudwatch Cloudtrail Configuration Changes Alarm Missing

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:CreateLoginProfile' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:CreateLoginProfile'

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:CreateAccessKey' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:CreateAccessKey'

remediation: Role with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Role With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion'

remediation: ELB Predefined or Custom Security Policies must not use insecure protocols, to reduce the risk of the SSL connection between the client and the load balancer being exploited. That means the 'name' of 'policy_attributes' must not coincide with any of a predefined list of insecure protocols.
title: ELB Using Insecure Protocols

remediation: IAM role allows all services or principals to assume it
title: IAM Role Allows All Principals To Assume

remediation: SSO policies should be configured to grant limited administrative privileges, rather than full access to all resources. This approach allows for better security and control over the resources being accessed.
title: SSO Policy with full privileges

remediation: Lambda access/secret keys should not be hardcoded
title: Hardcoded AWS Access Key In Lambda

remediation: All AWS CloudFront distributions should be integrated with the Web Application Firewall (AWS WAF) service
title: CloudFront Without WAF

remediation: The Remote Desktop port is open to the internet in a Security Group
title: Remote Desktop Port Open To Internet

remediation: API Gateway Method should restrict the authorization type, except for the HTTP OPTIONS method.
title: API Gateway With Open Access

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'ec2:RunInstances' and 'iam:PassRole' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'ec2:RunInstances' And 'iam:PassRole'

remediation: Make sure Logging is enabled for Redshift Cluster
title: Redshift Cluster Logging Disabled

remediation: Elasticsearch Domain policy should avoid wildcard in 'Action' and 'Principal'.
title: Elasticsearch Domain With Vulnerable Policy

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:CreatePolicyVersion' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:CreatePolicyVersion'

remediation: CloudTrail should be integrated with CloudWatch
title: CloudTrail Not Integrated With CloudWatch

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'cloudformation:CreateStack' and 'iam:PassRole' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'cloudformation:CreateStack' And 'iam:PassRole'

remediation: S3 bucket allows public policy
title: S3 Bucket Allows Public Policy

remediation: Amazon Aurora does not have encryption for data at rest enabled. To prevent such a scenario, update the attribute 'StorageEncrypted' to 'true'.
title: Aurora With Disabled at Rest Encryption

remediation: ElastiCache Replication Group encryption should be enabled at Transit
title: ElastiCache Replication Group Not Encrypted At Transit

remediation: It is not advisable for AWS Lambda Functions to have privileged permissions.
title: Lambda Function With Privileged Role

remediation: API Gateway Stage should have Access Logging Settings defined
title: API Gateway Access Logging Disabled

remediation: IAM password should have the required minimum length
title: IAM Password Without Minimum Length

remediation: Content Delivery Network (CDN) service is used within an AWS account to secure and accelerate the delivery of websites. The use of a CDN can provide a layer of security between your origin content and the destination.
title: CDN Configuration Is Missing

remediation: Make sure the AWS RDS configuration has automatic backup configured. If the retention period is equal to 0 there is no backup
title: RDS With Backup Disabled

remediation: S3 Buckets must not allow Get Action From All Principals, as to prevent leaking private information to the entire internet or allow unauthorized data tampering / deletion. This means the 'Effect' must not be 'Allow' when the 'Action' is Get, for all Principals.
title: S3 Bucket Allows Get Action From All Principals

remediation: The IP address in a DB Security Group should not be '0.0.0.0/0' (IPv4) or '::/0' (IPv6). If so, any IP can access it
title: DB Security Group With Public Scope

remediation: S3 bucket without restriction of public bucket
title: S3 Bucket Without Restriction Of Public Bucket

remediation: Block device mappings for Launch Configurations and EC2 instances should mandate encryption of all attached EBS volumes to safeguard sensitive data. This is achieved by specifying the 'encrypted' parameter with a value of 'true' for each volume.
title: Block Device Is Not Encrypted

remediation: ELB should have logging enabled to help on error investigation
title: ELB Access Log Disabled

remediation: DOCDB Cluster should be encrypted with customer-managed KMS keys instead of AWS managed keys
title: DOCDB Cluster Encrypted With AWS Managed Key

remediation: IAM Authentication should be enabled to verify the access of users and applications to your databases by enabling IAM policies and multi-factor authentication. This is a safety measure to ensure the protection of newly created databases without the proper IAM policies or in the change of policies in existing databases.
title: IAM DB Cluster Auth Not Enabled

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for route table changes
title: CloudWatch Route Table Changes Alarm Missing

remediation: Customer Master Keys (CMK) must have rotation enabled, which means the attribute 'enable_key_rotation' must be set to 'true' when the key is enabled.
title: CMK Rotation Disabled

remediation: EC2 Instance should have detailed monitoring enabled. With detailed monitoring enabled data is available in 1-minute periods
title: EC2 Instance Monitoring Disabled

remediation: Check if ElasticSearch encryption is disabled at Rest
title: ElasticSearch Not Encrypted At Rest

remediation: Check if the redis version is compliant with the necessary AWS PCI DSS requirements
title: Redis Not Compliant

remediation: Amazon Elastic Filesystem should have filesystem encryption enabled using KMS CMK customer-managed keys instead of AWS managed-keys
title: EFS Without KMS

remediation: Check if Record is set
title: Route53 Record Undefined

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for S3 bucket policy changes
title: CloudWatch S3 policy Change Alarm Missing

remediation: SNS (Simple Notification Service) Topic should be encrypted
title: SNS Topic Not Encrypted

remediation: Elastic MapReduce Cluster (EMR) should be launched in a Virtual Private Cloud (VPC)
title: EMR Without VPC

remediation: Amazon Elasticsearch does not have encryption for its domains enabled. To prevent such a scenario, update the attribute 'EnforceHTTPS' to true.
title: Elasticsearch with HTTPS disabled

remediation: AWS CloudFormation Stack should have a stack policy in order to protect stack resources from update actions
title: No Stack Policy

remediation: IAM policies shouldn't allow full administrative privileges (for all resources)
title: IAM Policies With Full Privileges

remediation: Ensure MSK Cluster Logging is enabled
title: MSK Cluster Logging Disabled

remediation: RDS should not run in public subnet
title: RDS Associated with Public Subnet

remediation: Role with privilege escalation by actions 'ec2:RunInstances' and 'iam:PassRole' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Role With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'ec2:RunInstances' And 'iam:PassRole'

remediation: Check if MQ Brokers don't have logging enabled in any of the two options possible (audit and general).
title: MQ Broker Logging Disabled

remediation: RDS Storage should be encrypted, which means the attribute 'storage_encrypted' should be set to 'true'
title: RDS Storage Not Encrypted

remediation: ECS Services must not have Admin roles, which means the attribute 'iam_role' must not be an admin role
title: ECS Service Admin Role Is Present

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy' and 'sts:AssumeRole' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy' And 'sts:AssumeRole'

remediation: SES policy should not allow IAM actions to all principals
title: SES Policy With Allowed IAM Actions

remediation: RDS must not be defined with public interface, which means the field 'publicly_accessible' should not be set to 'true' (default is 'false').
title: RDS DB Instance Publicly Accessible

remediation: Any IAM User should not have more than one access key since it increases the risk of unauthorized access and compromise credentials
title: IAM User Has Too Many Access Keys

remediation: Role with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:UpdateLoginProfile' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Role With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:UpdateLoginProfile'

remediation: Amazon EKS control plane logging is not enabled
title: EKS cluster logging is not enabled

remediation: A sensitive port, such as port 23 or port 110, is open for the whole network in either TCP or UDP protocol
title: Sensitive Port Is Exposed To Entire Network

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for AWS organizations changes
title: CloudWatch AWS Organizations Changes Missing Alarm

remediation: S3 Buckets should not be readable and writable to all users
title: S3 Bucket ACL Allows Read Or Write to All Users

remediation: CloudFront web distributions should use custom (and not default) SSL certificates. Custom SSL certificates allow only defined users to access content by using an alternate domain name instead of the default one.
title: Vulnerable Default SSL Certificate

remediation: 'SSH' (TCP:22) should not be public in AWS Network ACL
title: Network ACL With Unrestricted Access To SSH

remediation: RDS instance should have automatic minor upgrades enabled, which means the attribute 'auto_minor_version_upgrade' must be set to true.
title: Automatic Minor Upgrades Disabled

remediation: EBS Encryption should be enabled
title: EBS Default Encryption Disabled

remediation: AmazonMQ Broker should have Encryption Options defined
title: AmazonMQ Broker Encryption Disabled

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:AttachRolePolicy' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'

remediation: Users should authenticate with MFA (Multi-factor Authentication) to ensure an extra layer of protection when authenticating
title: Authentication Without MFA

remediation: CodeBuild Project should be encrypted with customer-managed KMS keys instead of AWS managed keys
title: CodeBuild Project Encrypted With AWS Managed Key

remediation: ELBv2 LBs should have access log enabled to capture detailed information about requests sent to your load balancer.
title: ELBv2 LB Access Log Disabled

remediation: Allowing to run lambda function using public API Gateway
title: Public Lambda via API Gateway

remediation: The use of AWS SSO for creating users may pose a security risk as it does not synchronize with external Identity Providers (IdP) or Active Directory (AD). This can lead to inconsistencies and potential unauthorized access to resources. It is recommended to review and update user creation processes to ensure proper security protocols are in place.
title: SSO Identity User Unsafe Creation

remediation: Redshift should not use the default port (5439) because an attacker can easily guess the port
title: Redshift Using Default Port

remediation: Checks if any static websites are hosted on buckets. Even static websites can be a liability when poorly configured.
title: S3 Static Website Host Enabled

remediation: Amazon EKS public endpoint shoud be set to false
title: EKS Cluster Has Public Access

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion'

remediation: User Data should not contain a base64 encoded private key. If so, anyone can decode the private key easily
title: User Data Contains Encoded Private Key

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for management console sign-in without MFA
title: CloudWatch Console Sign-in Without MFA Alarm Missing

remediation: Neptune logging should be enabled
title: Neptune Logging Is Disabled

remediation: Check if default security group does not restrict all inbound and outbound traffic.
title: Default Security Groups With Unrestricted Traffic

remediation: Security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 and/or ::/0
title: Unrestricted Security Group Ingress

remediation: AWS DOCDB Cluster should be encrypted with a KMS encryption key
title: DOCDB Cluster Without KMS

remediation: Elastic File System (EFS) must be encrypted
title: EFS Not Encrypted

remediation: Check if SNS topic name is set for CloudTrail
title: CloudTrail SNS Topic Name Undefined

remediation: Security group must be used or not declared
title: Security Group Not Used

remediation: ELB Predefined or Custom Security Policies must not use weak ciphers, to reduce the risk of the SSL connection between the client and the load balancer being exploited. That means the 'name' of 'policy_attributes' must not coincide with any of a predefined list of weak ciphers.
title: ELB Using Weak Ciphers

remediation: Checks if logging is enabled for CloudTrail.
title: CloudTrail Logging Disabled

remediation: S3 Bucket policy should not accept HTTP Requests
title: S3 Bucket Policy Accepts HTTP Requests

remediation: ElastiCache should have Redis enabled, since it covers Compliance Certifications such as FedRAMP, HIPAA, and PCI DSS. For more information, take a look at 'https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonElastiCache/latest/mem-ug/SelectEngine.html'
title: Redis Disabled

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for security group changes
title: Cloudwatch Security Group Changes Alarm Missing

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for unauthorized API calls
title: CloudWatch Unauthorized Access Alarm Missing

remediation: AWS ECS Task Definition EFS data in transit between AWS ECS host and AWS EFS server should be encrypted
title: EFS Volume With Disabled Transit Encryption

remediation: API Gateway should have a Security Policy defined and use TLS 1.2.
title: API Gateway Without Security Policy

remediation: Check if any MQ Broker is not publicly accessible
title: MQ Broker Is Publicly Accessible

remediation: The IP address in a DB Security Group must not have more than 256 hosts.
title: DB Security Group Open To Large Scope

remediation: S3 bucket without ignore public ACL
title: S3 Bucket Without Ignore Public ACL

remediation: VPC Subnet should not assign public IP
title: VPC Subnet Assigns Public IP

remediation: CloudTrail log file validation should be enabled to determine whether a log file has not been tampered
title: CloudTrail Log File Validation Disabled

remediation: Public AWS MSK allows anyone to interact with the Apache Kafka broker, therefore increasing the opportunity for malicious activity. To prevent such a scenario, it is recommended for AWS MSK to not be publicly accessible
title: MSK Broker Is Publicly Accessible

remediation: Check if port 2383 on TCP is publicly accessible by checking the CIDR block range that can access it.
title: SQL Analysis Services Port 2383 (TCP) Is Publicly Accessible

remediation: Checks if the connection between CloudFront and the viewer is encrypted
title: Cloudfront Viewer Protocol Policy Allows HTTP

remediation: S3 bucket should have versioning enabled
title: S3 Bucket Without Versioning

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for disabling or scheduled deletion of customer created CMK
title: CloudWatch Disabling Or Scheduled Deletion Of Customer Created CMK Alarm Missing

remediation: DocDB logging should be enabled
title: DocDB Logging Is Disabled

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'

remediation: IAM policy should not grant full permissions to resources from the get-go, instead of granting permissions gradually as necessary.
title: IAM Policy Grants Full Permissions

remediation: S3 Buckets should not be readable to any authenticated user
title: S3 Bucket ACL Allows Read to Any Authenticated User

remediation: API Gateway should have X-Ray Tracing enabled
title: API Gateway X-Ray Disabled

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for AWS Management Console authentication failures
title: CloudWatch Management Console Auth Failed Alarm Missing

remediation: Sagemaker endpoint configuration should encrypt data
title: Sagemaker Endpoint Configuration Encryption Disabled

remediation: AWS Security Group should not have an unknown port exposed to the entire Internet
title: Unknown Port Exposed To Internet

remediation: EC2 Instance should not have a public IP address.
title: EC2 Instance Has Public IP

remediation: Role with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:CreateAccessKey' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Role With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:CreateAccessKey'

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for AWS Config configuration changes
title: CloudWatch AWS Config Configuration Changes Alarm Missing

remediation: Check if the Amazon Organizations ensure that all features are enabled to achieve full control over the use of AWS services and actions across multiple AWS accounts using Service Control Policies (SCPs).
title: Service Control Policies Disabled

remediation: Check if secure ciphers aren't used in CloudFront
title: Secure Ciphers Disabled

remediation: AWS Kinesis Server data at rest should have Server Side Encryption (SSE) enabled
title: Kinesis SSE Not Configured

remediation: ElastiCache should not use the default port (an attacker can easily guess the port). For engine set to Redis, the default port is 6379. The Memcached default port is 11211
title: ElastiCache Using Default Port

remediation: Logs delivered by CloudTrail should be encrypted using KMS to increase security of your CloudTrail
title: CloudTrail Log Files Not Encrypted With KMS

remediation: SNS topic Publicity should not have 'Effect: Allow' and argument 'NotAction' at the same time. If it has 'Effect: Allow', the argument stated should be 'Action'.
title: SNS Topic Publicity Has Allow and NotAction Simultaneously

remediation: S3 Bucket Object should have server-side encryption enabled
title: S3 Bucket Object Not Encrypted

remediation: It's considered a best practice for an EC2 instance to use an EBS optimized instance. This provides the best performance for your EBS volumes by minimizing contention between Amazon EBS I/O and other traffic from your instance
title: EC2 Not EBS Optimized

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:PutUserPolicy' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:PutUserPolicy'

remediation: Amazon EKS public endpoint is enables and accessible to all: 0.0.0.0/0"
title: EKS Cluster Has Public Access CIDRs

remediation: API Gateway Deployment should have access log setting defined when connected to an API Gateway Stage.
title: API Gateway Deployment Without Access Log Setting

remediation: EKS Cluster should be encrypted
title: EKS Cluster Encryption Disabled

remediation: S3 Buckets should not allow WRITE_ACP permission to the S3 Bucket Access Control List in order to prevent AWS accounts or IAM users to modify access control permissions to the bucket.
title: S3 Bucket ACL Grants WRITE_ACP Permission

remediation: RDS Database Cluster Encryption should be enabled
title: RDS Database Cluster not Encrypted

remediation: 'SSH' (TCP:22) should not be public in AWS Security Group
title: Security Group With Unrestricted Access To SSH

remediation: S3 Buckets must not allow List Action From All Principals, as to prevent leaking private information to the entire internet or allow unauthorized data tampering / deletion. This means the 'Effect' must not be 'Allow' when the 'Action' is List, for all Principals.
title: S3 Bucket Allows List Action From All Principals

remediation: Batch Job Definition should not have Privileged Container Properties
title: Batch Job Definition With Privileged Container Properties

remediation: Amazon EKS control plane logging don't enabled for all log types
title: Missing Cluster Log Types

remediation: An API Key should be required on a method request.
title: API Gateway Method Does Not Contains An API Key

remediation: It's considered a best practice for all rules in AWS Security Group to have a description
title: Security Group Rule Without Description

remediation: ECR Repository should have Policies attached to it
title: ECR Repository Without Policy

remediation: The API Endpoint type in API Gateway should be set to PRIVATE so it's not exposed to the public internet
title: API Gateway Endpoint Config is Not Private

remediation: Ensure a log metric filter and alarm exist for network gateways changes
title: CloudWatch Network Gateways Changes Alarm Missing

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:AttachGroupPolicy' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:AttachGroupPolicy'

remediation: Tags of the RDS Cluster should be copied to the respective snapshots to ensure that snapshots retain important metadata for identification, cost allocation, and resource management
title: Tags Not Copied to RDS Cluster Snapshot

remediation: ElastiCache Nodes should be created across multi az, which means 'az_mode' should be set to 'cross-az' in multi nodes cluster
title: ElastiCache Nodes Not Created Across Multi AZ

remediation: Ensure MSK Cluster encryption in rest and transit is enabled
title: MSK Cluster Encryption Disabled

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:UpdateLoginProfile' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:UpdateLoginProfile'

remediation: Make sure that retain_stack is enabled to keep the Stack and it's associated resources during resource destruction
title: Stack Retention Disabled

remediation: It's considered a best practice when using Application Load Balancers to drop invalid header fields
title: ALB Not Dropping Invalid Headers

remediation: Amazon Simple Queue Service (SQS) queue should protect the contents of their messages using Server-Side Encryption (SSE)
title: SQS With SSE Disabled

remediation: Make sure that Amazon GuardDuty is Enabled
title: GuardDuty Detector Disabled

remediation: IAM Access Key should not be active for root users
title: IAM Access Key Is Exposed

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:AttachGroupPolicy' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:AttachGroupPolicy'

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:AttachUserPolicy' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'

remediation: AWS Lambda Function should be configured for a Dead Letter Queue(DLQ)
title: Lambda Function Without Dead Letter Queue

remediation: Checks for dangerous permissions in Action statements in an SQS Queue Policy. This is deemed a potential security risk as it would allow various attacks to the queue
title: SQS Policy With Public Access

remediation: AWS Key Management Service (KMS) must only possess usable Customer Master Keys (CMK), which means the CMKs must have the attribute 'is_enabled' set to true
title: CMK Is Unusable

remediation: It's considered a best practice to have point in time recovery enabled for DynamoDB Table
title: DynamoDB Table Point In Time Recovery Disabled

remediation: Lambda permission may be misconfigured if the action field is not filled in by 'lambda:InvokeFunction'
title: Lambda Permission Misconfigured

remediation: ElastiCache Replication Group encryption should be enabled at Rest
title: ElastiCache Replication Group Not Encrypted At Rest

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:SetDefaultPolicyVersion'

remediation: Group with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy' and 'sts:AssumeRole' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy' And 'sts:AssumeRole'

remediation: Check if any ElasticSearch domain isn't encrypted with KMS.
title: ElasticSearch Encryption With KMS Disabled

remediation: S3 Buckets must not allow Actions From All Principals, as to prevent leaking private information to the entire internet or allow unauthorized data tampering / deletion. This means the 'Effect' must not be 'Allow' when there are All Principals
title: S3 Bucket Access to Any Principal

More Information: https://repost.aws/knowledge-center/rds-postgresql-cleartext-logging
title: Postgres RDS logging disabled

remediation: IAM Database Auth Enabled should be configured to true when using compatible engine and version

title: Stack Without Template

title: Elasticsearch Domain Not Encrypted Node To Node

title: Default VPC Exists

title: Neptune Cluster Instance is Publicly Accessible

title: CloudWatch VPC Changes Alarm Missing

remediation: AWS IAM Users should not have access to console
title: IAM User With Access To Console

remediation: Unchangeable passwords in AWS password policy
title: AWS Password Policy With Unchangeable Passwords

remediation: The CA certificate Identifier must be 'rds-ca-2019'.
title: CA Certificate Identifier Is Outdated

remediation: Network_Mode should be 'awsvpc' in ecs_task_definition. AWS VPCs provides the controls to facilitate a formal process for approving and testing all network connections and changes to the firewall and router configurations
title: ECS Task Definition Network Mode Not Recommended

remediation: API Gateway should have WAF (Web Application Firewall) enabled
title: API Gateway without WAF

remediation: 'RDP' (TCP:3389) should not be public in AWS Network ACL
title: Network ACL With Unrestricted Access To RDP

remediation: AWS Secretmanager should use AWS KMS customer master key (CMK) to encrypt the secret values in the versions stored in the secret
title: Secretsmanager Secret Without KMS

remediation: EC2 Instances should be configured under a VPC network. AWS VPCs provide the controls to facilitate a formal process for approving and testing all network connections and changes to the firewall and router configurations.
title: Instance With No VPC

remediation: S3 Buckets should not have all permissions, as to prevent leaking private information to the entire internet or allow unauthorized data tampering / deletion. This means the 'Effect' must not be 'Allow' when the 'Action' is '*', for all Principals.
title: S3 Bucket With All Permissions

remediation: S3 Bucket object-level CloudTrail logging should be enabled for read and write events
title: S3 Bucket Object Level CloudTrail Logging Disabled

remediation: Checks if the SQS Queue is exposed
title: SQS Queue Exposed

remediation: Check if AWS config rules do not identify Encrypted Volumes as a source.
title: Config Rule For Encrypted Volumes Disabled

remediation: AWS Config Configuration Aggregator All Regions must be set to True
title: Configuration Aggregator to All Regions Disabled

remediation: AWS Elasticsearch should have logs enabled
title: Elasticsearch Log Disabled

title: Glue Security Configuration Encryption Disabled

title: Lambda With Vulnerable Policy

remediation: AWS Redshift Clusters must not be publicly accessible. Check if 'publicly_accessible' field is true or undefined (default is true)

remediation: Application Load Balancer should have deletion protection enabled
title: ALB Deletion Protection Disabled

remediation: REST API policy should avoid wildcard in 'Action' and 'Principal'
title: REST API With Vulnerable Policy

remediation: SNS (Simple Notification Service) Topic should be encrypted with customer-managed KMS keys instead of AWS managed keys
title: SNS Topic Encrypted With AWS Managed Key

remediation: IAM role policy that allow full administrative privileges (for all resources)
title: IAM Role With Full Privileges

remediation: AWS Athena Database data in S3 should be encrypted
title: Athena Database Not Encrypted

remediation: SNS Topic Policy should not allow any principal to access
title: SNS Topic is Publicly Accessible

title: VPC Peering Route Table with Unrestricted CIDR

remediation: IAM policies should be attached only to groups or roles
title: IAM Policies Attached To User

remediation: Check if the root user is authenticated with MFA

remediation: IAM password policies should be set through the password minimum length and reset password attributes
title: No Password Policy Enabled

remediation: AWS CloudFormation should have stack notifications enabled to be notified when an event occurs
title: Stack Notifications Disabled

title: API Gateway Method Settings Cache Not Encrypted

remediation: AWS Workspaces Workspace data stored in volumes should be encrypted
title: Workspaces Workspace Volume Not Encrypted

title: IAM policy allows for data exfiltration

remediation: EKS node group remote access is disabled when 'SourceSecurityGroups' is missing
title: EKS node group remote access disabled

remediation: Autoscaling groups should supply tags to configurate
title: Autoscaling Groups Supply Tags

remediation: Limits access to AWS AMIs by checking if more than one account is using the same image
title: AMI Shared With Multiple Accounts

remediation: Amazon ECS Services should not be assigned public IP addresses. Public IP assignment exposes services directly to the internet, increasing the attack surface and potential unauthorized access.
title: ECS Services assigned with public IP address

remediation: All policies, except IAM identity-based policies, should have the 'Principal' element defined
title: Policy Without Principal

remediation: AWS DOCDB Cluster storage should be encrypted
title: DOCDB Cluster Not Encrypted

remediation: RDS should not use the default port (an attacker can easily guess the port). For engines related to Aurora, MariaDB or MySQL, the default port is 3306. PostgreSQL default port is 5432, Oracle default port is 1521 and SQL Server default port is 1433
title: RDS Using Default Port

remediation: IAM Policy should not grant 'AssumeRole' permission across all services.
title: IAM Policy Grants 'AssumeRole' Permission Across All Services

remediation: CloudTrail Log Files S3 Bucket should not be publicly accessible
title: CloudTrail Log Files S3 Bucket is Publicly Accessible

remediation: Role with privilege escalation by actions 'cloudformation:CreateStack' and 'iam:PassRole' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Role With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'cloudformation:CreateStack' And 'iam:PassRole'

remediation: S3 bucket public access is overridden by S3 bucket Public Access Block when the following attributes are set to true - 'block_public_acls', 'block_public_policy', 'ignore_public_acls', and 'restrict_public_buckets'
title: S3 Bucket Public ACL Overridden By Public Access Block

remediation: User with privilege escalation by actions 'iam:AddUserToGroup' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.

title: Group With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:PutRolePolicy'

remediation: Instance metadata can be accessed with both IMDSv1 or IMDSv2. Although, IMDSv2 service is a session-oriented service, granting additional protection against exposure of metadata information. That version should be used instead of IMDSv1 in order to mitigate those situations.
title: Instance Uses Metadata Service IMDSv1

remediation: Expired SSL/TLS certificates should be removed
title: Certificate Has Expired

remediation: Public and private EC2 istances should not share the same role.
title: Public and Private EC2 Share Role

remediation: Role with privilege escalation by actions 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode' and Resource set to '*'. For more information see https://rhinosecuritylabs.com/aws/aws-privilege-escalation-methods-mitigation/.
title: Role With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'

remediation: S3 bucket without MFA Delete Enabled. MFA delete cannot be enabled through Terraform, it can be done by adding a MFA device (https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/id_credentials_mfa_enable.html) and enabling versioning and MFA delete by using AWS CLI: 'aws s3api put-bucket-versioning --versioning-configuration=Status=Enabled,MFADelete=Enabled --bucket=<BUCKET_NAME> --mfa=<MFA_SERIAL_NUMBER>'. Please, also notice that MFA delete can not be used with lifecycle configurations
title: S3 Bucket Without Enabled MFA Delete

remediation: Neptune Cluster should have IAM Database Authentication enabled
title: Neptune Cluster With IAM Database Authentication Disabled

remediation: API Gateway Stage should have API Gateway UsagePlan defined and associated.
title: API Gateway Stage Without API Gateway UsagePlan Associated

remediation: It's considered a best practice for AWS Security Group to have a description
title: Security Group Without Description

remediation: EBS volumes should be encrypted
title: EBS Volume Encryption Disabled

remediation: Unattached EIPs from EC2 instances should be disabled to allow us to maintain better control, efficiency, and visibility over the network traffic and implement security measures more effectively

remediation: AWS DynamoDB Tables should have server-side encryption
title: DynamoDB Table Not Encrypted

remediation: SSM Session should be encrypted in transit
title: SSM Session Transit Encryption Disabled

remediation: No password expiration policy
title: Misconfigured Password Policy Expiration

remediation: SSO permissions should be configured to limit user sessions to no longer than 1 hour. Allowing longer sessions can increase the risk of unauthorized access or session hijacking. This is a best practice for security and should be implemented in SSO permission settings.
title: SSO Permission With Inadequate User Session Duration

remediation: AWS Redshift Cluster should be encrypted. Check if 'encrypted' field is false or undefined (default is false)
title: Redshift Not Encrypted

remediation: S3 bucket allows public ACL
title: S3 Bucket Allows Public ACL

remediation: ECR should have an image tag be immutable. This prevents image tags from being overwritten.
title: ECR Image Tag Not Immutable

remediation: S3 Buckets must not allow Put Action From All Principals, as to prevent leaking private information to the entire internet or allow unauthorized data tampering / deletion. This means the 'Effect' must not be 'Allow' when the 'Action' is Put, for all Principals.

remediation: Glue policy should avoid wildcard in 'principals' and 'actions'

remediation: Athena Workgroup query results should be encrypted, for all queries that run in the workgroup
title: Athena Workgroup Not Encrypted

title: CloudWatch Logs Destination With Vulnerable Policy

title: User With Privilege Escalation By Actions 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'

title: Sensitive Port Is Exposed To Small Public Network

title: S3 bucket notifications disabled
